scripts.test:backend: py -3.11 -m pytest services/local-api/tests && py -3.11 -m pytest services/demo-gateway/tests
scripts.test: npm run test:desktop && npm run test:backend
scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:desktop
scripts.build:public: npm run build:backend && npm run build
scripts.build:demo: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (Test-Path resources/private/demo-provider.json) { Write-Host 'demo-provider.json found; demo build will bundle it.' } else { Write-Warning 'demo-provider.json not found; Demo will use offline fallback.' }"; npm run build:public
